query:
SELECT 
  id,
  worker_id,
  work_date,
  check_in_time,
  check_out_time,
  base_salary,
  net_salary,
  created_at
FROM worker_daily_finance 
ORDER BY work_date DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3UmgapDHiQE9iXi.root --database BmzBEddPNYVc6c68xYfpnY --execute SELECT 
  id,
  worker_id,
  work_date,
  check_in_time,
  check_out_time,
  base_salary,
  net_salary,
  created_at
FROM worker_daily_finance 
ORDER BY work_date DESC;
